g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does SQS trigger this Lambda function?')
sendPrompt('What gets logged at the start of this Lambda?')
sendPrompt('How does Lambda parse the SQS message body?')
sendPrompt('What is the DynamoDB conditional write doing here?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a file is accepted as new?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a duplicate file is detected?')
sendPrompt('What does the Lambda do if all files were duplicates?')
sendPrompt('What input does Lambda send to the Step Function?')
sendPrompt('What gets logged when there are no new files?')
